LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CLASS ACTION SERVICES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE DECLARATORY RELIEF ACTION IS ADEQUATELY PLED. THE ISSUE OF WHETHER THE 2007 AGREEMENT WAS A NOVATION TO THE 2003 AGREEMENT IS A QUESTION OF FACT NOT AMENABLE TO RESOLUTION ON A DEMURRER. THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT AFFIRMATIVELY SHOW THAT IT IS TIME-BARRED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JEFF DORIA'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Granted. The court will sign the proposed order provided with courtesy copies. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. THOMAS J. MARTIN & ATTY. BOB GOLD OF WILSON SONSINI & ROSATI, TEL. NO. (650) 320-4902 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ALEXANDRA P. SUMMER & ATTY. MIKAL J. CONDON OF K & L GATES, TEL. NO. 882-8016 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CLASS ACTION SERVICES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. The declaratory relief action is adequately pled. The issue of whether the 2007 Agreement was a novation to the 2003 Agreement is a question of fact not amenable to resolution on a demurrer. The complaint does not affirmatively show that it is time-barred. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
